CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/R. Woods; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: JILL BATES-MOORE, ESQ. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Ms. Moore reports to the Court that settlement was reached among the parties. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause on FEB-02-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
